attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS)

FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS,
(
select COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS
minus
select COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS.COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_ELEMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
